---
title: "Data Privacy Compliance Training"
subtitle: "A 2-day intensive workshop on privacy regulations and compliance frameworks"
description: "Comprehensive 2-day workshop on data privacy regulations, compliance frameworks, and practical implementation strategies for privacy officers, compliance managers, and IT professionals responsible for data protection."
page-layout: full
format:
  html:
    toc: false
    include-in-header:
      text: |
        <style>.m { --c: #F5A623; }</style>
categories:
  - data-privacy
  - compliance
  - gdpr
  - regulatory-frameworks
---

```{=html}
<div class="m">

<div class="m-hero">
  <div class="container">
    <h1>Data Privacy <span class="gr">Compliance</span></h1>
    <p>Navigate complex privacy regulations with confidence</p>
  </div>
</div>

<div class="container">
```

## Training Overview

This intensive 2-day workshop provides a comprehensive introduction to data privacy regulations, compliance frameworks, and practical implementation strategies. Designed for privacy officers, compliance managers, and IT professionals responsible for data protection, this training focuses on hands-on exercises and real-world scenarios to build a robust data privacy program that meets global regulatory requirements.

### Next Session

- **Dates:** September 15-16, 2025
- **Times:** 9:00 AM - 5:00 PM each day
- **Format:** Available in-person or live virtual
- **Prerequisites:** Basic understanding of data handling processes
- **Price:** $1,195 per participant (includes materials, lunch for in-person attendees, and 30-day follow-up support)

## Training Curriculum

### Day 1: Privacy Regulations and Assessment Methodologies

**Morning Session: Global Privacy Regulatory Landscape**
- Major privacy regulations overview (GDPR, CCPA/CPRA, HIPAA, PIPEDA)
- Key principles of data protection legislation
- Territorial scope and applicability
- Individual rights and organizational obligations
- Hands-on exercise: Conducting a regulatory applicability assessment

**Afternoon Session: Privacy Impact Assessment and Data Mapping**
- Data inventory and classification methodologies
- Conducting effective data flow mapping
- Privacy Impact Assessment (PIA) frameworks
- Data Protection Impact Assessment (DPIA) requirements
- Hands-on exercise: Developing a PIA for a sample business process

### Day 2: Compliance Implementation and Risk Management

**Morning Session: Operationalizing Privacy Compliance**
- Designing a privacy governance structure
- Implementing privacy by design principles
- Developing compliant consent mechanisms
- Data subject rights management systems
- Hands-on exercise: Creating a data subject request handling procedure

**Afternoon Session: Vendor Management and Breach Response**
- Third-party risk assessment frameworks
- Data processing agreements and contractual safeguards
- Data breach identification and classification
- Notification requirements and timelines
- Hands-on exercise: Tabletop data breach simulation

## Learning Outcomes

By completing this training, participants will be able to:

- Identify applicable privacy regulations for their organization
- Conduct comprehensive data mapping and classification
- Implement privacy impact assessment methodologies
- Develop effective privacy policies and procedures
- Establish data subject rights fulfillment processes
- Create incident response plans for data breaches
- Design third-party risk management frameworks

## Training Methods

```{=html}
<div class="row mt-4">
  <div class="col-md-6">
    <div class="card mb-4">
      <div class="card-header bg-primary text-white">
        <h3 class="card-title mb-0">Hands-On Learning</h3>
      </div>
      <div class="card-body">
        <p>This training emphasizes practical application with over 60% of course time dedicated to hands-on exercises and activities:</p>
        <ul>
          <li>Interactive compliance assessments</li>
          <li>Privacy documentation development</li>
          <li>Case study analysis</li>
          <li>Regulatory interpretation exercises</li>
          <li>Compliance program development worksheets</li>
        </ul>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
  
  <div class="col-md-6">
    <div class="card mb-4">
      <div class="card-header bg-primary text-white">
        <h3 class="card-title mb-0">Expert Instruction</h3>
      </div>
      <div class="card-body">
        <p>Our instructors bring extensive privacy compliance experience to the training:</p>
        <ul>
          <li>Certified privacy professionals (CIPP/E, CIPM)</li>
          <li>Experience implementing global compliance programs</li>
          <li>Regulatory response expertise</li>
          <li>Best practices from diverse industries</li>
          <li>Practical implementation strategies</li>
        </ul>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>
```

## Who Should Attend

This training is ideal for:

- Privacy officers and data protection officers
- Compliance managers and specialists
- IT security professionals responsible for data protection
- Legal professionals advising on privacy matters
- Risk management professionals
- Information governance specialists
- Business managers handling personal data

Basic understanding of organizational data handling processes is beneficial, but no specific privacy expertise is required.

## Materials and Resources

Participants will receive:

- Comprehensive digital training manual
- Privacy regulation comparison charts
- Assessment templates and checklists
- Sample privacy policies and procedures
- Data breach response toolkit
- Certificate of completion
- 30 days of post-training email support
- Access to recorded sessions for reference

## Lead Instructor

```{=html}
<div class="row mt-4 mb-5">
  <div class="col-md-3">
    <img src="/assets/images/stock/hackathon-team.jpg" alt="Instructor Photo" class="img-fluid rounded">
  </div>
  <div class="col-md-9">
    <h3>Elena Popescu</h3>
    <p><strong>Data Protection Officer, chen.ist</strong></p>
    <p>Elena has over 10 years of experience in privacy compliance, having implemented GDPR programs for multinational organizations and advised on global privacy frameworks. She holds CIPP/E, CIPM, and CIPT certifications and specializes in privacy program development for technology companies.</p>
    <p>Elena is known for her practical approach to privacy compliance, focusing on business-friendly solutions that effectively protect personal data while enabling organizational goals.</p>
  </div>
</div>
```

## Testimonials

```{=html}
<div class="row mt-5">
  <div class="col-md-6">
    <div class="card mb-4">
      <div class="card-body">
        <p class="font-italic">"This training transformed our approach to privacy compliance. The practical frameworks and implementation strategies allowed us to build a robust privacy program that effectively addresses regulatory requirements while supporting our business objectives."</p>
        <p class="text-end mb-0"><strong>— Cristian N., Compliance Director</strong></p>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
  
  <div class="col-md-6">
    <div class="card mb-4">
      <div class="card-body">
        <p class="font-italic">"As a newly appointed DPO, I needed comprehensive training on privacy regulations and practical implementation. This course delivered exactly that, with actionable templates and strategies that I could immediately apply to our organization's privacy program."</p>
        <p class="text-end mb-0"><strong>— Andreea M., Data Protection Officer</strong></p>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>
```

## Related Offerings

If you're interested in this training, you might also consider:

- [Data Protection and Privacy Course](/academy/courses/data-protection-privacy/) - Our comprehensive 10-week course for in-depth learning
- [Cybersecurity Essentials Training](/academy/trainings/cybersecurity-essentials/) - A complementary workshop for security fundamentals
- [Privacy by Design Workshop](/academy/webinars/privacy-by-design/) - A focused session on embedding privacy into products and processes

```{=html}
</div>

<div class="m-cta">
  <div class="container">
    <h2>Ready to get started?</h2>
    <p>Book a call to discuss your goals and find the right program.</p>
  </div>
</div>

</div>
```
